# Agentic CI/CD Copilot — Recommended Fix

Update the GitHub Actions workflow to run pytest with a writable log file path.

## Suggested Diff (apply manually if needed)

```diff
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ ... @@
       - name: Run tests
-        run: |
-          pytest
+        run: |
+          pytest --log-file=pytest.log
```
